archetypes.name: The Concierge
archetypes.shortDescription: The person who anticipates before anyone asks.
archetypes.keyStrength: Making other people feel taken care of.
archetypes.communicationStyle: Warm, specific, personally tailored. Signals attention to detail through named people, places, and preferences.

archetypes.name: The Strategist
archetypes.shortDescription: The pattern hunter who sees three moves ahead.
archetypes.keyStrength: Compounding today's decisions into a defensible position.
archetypes.communicationStyle: Framework-first, structured, long-view. Speaks in tradeoffs, unit economics, and second-order effects.
archetypes.watchOut: Can under-index on the emotional read of a room.

archetypes.name: The Analyst
archetypes.shortDescription: The truth-checker who wants the model, not the story.
archetypes.keyStrength: Landing a decision on the strongest available evidence.
archetypes.communicationStyle: Precise, sourced, quantified. Prefers a table to a paragraph.
archetypes.watchOut: Can slow a decision that a rougher signal could carry.

archetypes.name: The Visionary
archetypes.shortDescription: The one who describes a future the rest of us then help build.
archetypes.keyStrength: Making a bigger version of the plan feel obvious.
archetypes.communicationStyle: Metaphor-heavy, generative, energetic. Paints a picture that people want to stand inside.
archetypes.watchOut: Can float above the operational reality of shipping.

archetypes.name: The Advocate
archetypes.shortDescription: The one who carries a mission into every room they enter.
archetypes.keyStrength: Turning a cause into commitment from others.
archetypes.communicationStyle: Convicted, specific about who is being served, tied to outcomes that matter beyond the balance sheet.
archetypes.watchOut: Can read as strident when the audience is not yet convinced.

archetypes.name: The Storyteller
archetypes.shortDescription: The one who makes the point land through scene, character, and voice.
archetypes.keyStrength: Turning an argument into an experience the audience remembers.
archetypes.communicationStyle: Concrete, sensory, human. Reaches for the specific story over the general claim.
archetypes.watchOut: Can bury the ask under the narrative.

archetypes.name: The Producer
archetypes.shortDescription: The one who moves projects from talk into shipped work.
archetypes.keyStrength: Getting a real thing into real hands on a real date.
archetypes.communicationStyle: Action-first, deadline-anchored, concise. Names the next step in every message.
archetypes.watchOut: Can ship past a thoughtful edit.

archetypes.name: The Guide
archetypes.shortDescription: The one who teaches the shape of the problem so others can solve it.
archetypes.keyStrength: Building capability in the people around you.
archetypes.communicationStyle: Patient, principle-led, question-heavy. Draws the map instead of walking the path.
archetypes.watchOut: Can over-teach when the room needs a decision.
